o3 Answer:

   • Common factors: 2·3 = 6  

   Thus, GCF = 6.

2. Divide each term by the GCF and write the expression as a product:  

24x ÷ 6 = 4x  
42 ÷ 6 = 7  

So,  

24x − 42 = 6(4x − 7).

Answer: 6(4x − 7).
